---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new gauge type, parameter, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example:
"I'm always frustrated when I can't show a custom widget at the tip of an `ArcGauge`…"

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of the feature you want.

## API sketch (optional)

If you have a specific API in mind, sketch it out:

```dart
ArcGauge(
  controller: ctrl,
  // Proposed new parameter:
  tipWidget: const Icon(Icons.circle, size: 8),
)
```

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Links to reference implementations, design specs, or screenshots of the desired result.
